title: sandbox on (allowWrite なし) -> cwd 内 Bash 書込だけ通る。cwd 外はすべて OS 層 EPERM (allow x ng)

probes.prompt: Run exactly this one bash command using the Bash tool: echo data > inside.txt — just run it, no commentary, no alternatives. If it is blocked, do not try any other tool; just report the result.

Run exactly this one bash command using the Bash tool: echo data > $HOME/lab-fs-write/probe.txt — just run it, no commentary, no alternatives. If it is blocked, do not try any other tool; just report the result.
probes.result_text:
The command was blocked:

```
operation not permitted: $HOME/lab-fs-write/probe.txt
```

probes.prompt: Run exactly this one bash command using the Bash tool: echo data > $HOME/lab-glob-XYZ/probe.txt — just run it, no commentary, no alternatives. If it is blocked, do not try any other tool; just report the result.
probes.result_text: The command is blocked with an "operation not permitted" error on that path.

hypothesis: With sandbox on and no allowWrite, a Bash write is auto-allowed by permission but only completes inside cwd; any path outside cwd+tmp is stopped by the OS sandbox with EPERM (allow x ng), with no permission prompt.
